description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in a vertically striped, button-up blouse paired with a knee-length skirt. The individual is wearing dark ankle boots and has a straight ponytail hairstyle. Sunglasses cover the eyes, adding a touch of urban style and anonymity. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the posture suggests a natural walking motion. The overall appearance is that of a professional or business-casual urban commuter, suitable for a city street or sidewalk environment.
description: An adult pedestrian in a striped blouse, skirt, ankle boots, and sunglasses, walking with a natural stride. The figure has a ponytail and a business-casual urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped blouse, sunglasses, and relaxed walking posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail, profile of the face, and the side seam of the skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blouse, skirt, and the ponytail's full length.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the side of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up blouse and knee-length skirt with ankle boots and sunglasses
